targets.name: frigg
targets.message:
Hi frigg,

Your node "frigg" was a valuable contributor to IC Mesh - you completed 6 jobs and earned compute credits!

🎨 Your GPU capabilities (gpu-metal, stable-diffusion) are especially valuable right now. We're seeing growing demand for image generation and GPU-accelerated tasks.

📈 Network Update (since you've been offline 3 days):
• Revenue has grown to $771+ with 80+ jobs completed
• New job types available matching your capabilities: ffmpeg, gpu-metal, stable-diffusion
• Founding operator benefits still available (2x earnings, priority routing)

🚀 Quick Reconnection:
Just restart your IC Mesh client - your nodeId and earnings are preserved.
All your previous configuration should work automatically.

💰 Consider setting up automatic payouts via Stripe Connect for seamless earnings.

Questions or need help getting back online? Happy to help!

Dashboard: https://moilol.com/operate.html
Setup: https://github.com/intelligence-club/ic-mesh/blob/main/JOIN.md
